nasb.text: With him I speak mouth to mouth, Even openly, and not in dark sayings, And he beholds the form of the Lord. Why then were you not afraid To speak against My servant, against Moses?”

esv.text: With him I speak mouth to mouth, clearly, and not in riddles, and he beholds the form of the Lord. Why then were you not afraid to speak against my servant Moses?”

cnv.text: 我要與他面對面說話， 是親自說的，不是用謎語； 他必看見耶和華的形象， 你們出言反對我的僕人摩西， 為甚麼不懼怕呢？”

ccb.text: 我跟他面对面说话，清清楚楚，不用谜语，他看得见我的形象。你们怎敢批评我的仆人摩西？”
